TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == mabalatay a banges malawpesay a imelang ś©ęÁīčŤāĆśļ∂Ťß£Áóá == mabalatay a banges malawpesay a imelang: ilabuay nu mabalatay nu hecian malahul a adada. nu sipaw malahul a nipatahekalan tu ci-hun-su', micumud i idaidangan mila'cus tu buwa', sisa malibuwa' ku tademaw huming sa tu. u adada nina mabalatay a banges malawpesay a imelang, pasu adada nu hecihecian, muta' atu malawmaw ku balucu', anu pihaceng satu nu namakaydaay i nikaaddaan nu banges atu malibuwaay nu adada hakiya. ina imelangay a tademaw hakiya idaw ku kalalumenian nu sumanah nu kulitan a mahida u ti'kuk kasalengac nu isian atu caay kaicelang ku balucu. 1,000 U/L,ŚöīťáćśôāŚŹĮŤÉĹťęėśĖľ5,000 U/L. nikaduka ninaheci satabakiay nu namakayda namini i hekalay, mahida u nipacician a kawaw, malakuuyt ku nipinanam, sapayu atu pakalaluwayluway sa mukan, dumatu a nikaadadaan pasumalalid, maala nu dingki, mabayu', samuhmuh sa caay piyundu, caay ka taneng ku idang atu nikalatan nu bau. idaw ku siaulan a tademaw, sisa hinaadada ku hecihecian sa imelang satu. mabalatay a banges malawpesay a imelang hina sipakayda i isi' a mikinsa atu i sen-wi-cin mikinsa, anu nu isi'an anikinsaan tu tatipeluk u yen-sin nika itini i sen-wi-cin nai' ku sumanahay a idawng nu malian, hakiya aw u mabalatay a banges malawpesay a imelang. sipakayda i idang maadih ku ci-suen-ci-mei tadapihaceng ku lupenac mikikaka tu 1000 U/L , anu pahaceng hakiya mikikaka tu 5000 U/L. ina imelang atu nika imelangÁóáÁčÄŤąáŚĺĶŚÄô mabalatay a banges malawpesay a imelang a nina imelang namakayda i pihaceng atu nai' nu icelang nu buwa'an a nikatahekalan. anu caay ka pihaceng nai' ku hicahica nu adada nu hecian, sisa u nuduma kiya a wendayan kanca a kinsaan ku idang kiya katinengan. u tatengaay a mabalatay a banges malawpesay a imelang kanca tahekal ku nikaadada nu hecian, penecen adada', nai' ku icelang atu balebawa. . anu amelik ku nikalebawa, u idang amelik tayda i kikan micumud i madukaay a hecian sa, alaw a maselep ku idang atu mabulilah, mahiniay a kawaw alaw a namakayda i imelangay a tademaw, sipakayda i maluyuhay a lumaan a patahekal. nu dumaan a imelangan nai' ku hicahica a waywayan, alaw han u nikakelacan nu heci nika dukaan nu hecian a nikatahekalan. . nikadukaan nu heci anpatahekalan micumud i idaidangan, mala caay kalecad ku tin-cea-ce, sisa mangalay muli',muta', caay ka tineng tu tademaw, mabulilah atu malawlaw ku balucu', ina imelangay a tademaw u isi' nida hakiya idaw ku ci-hun-su tunika lumeni', itini i nakamuan nu misaydan u "uciyaan a kulitan nu isi'an". nika kukaan nu buwaan hina tida i heci tu mahkamaduka nu nikuda tu sabaw tusa katuku tu tusa a lasubu idaw ku sepat a tatukian a tahekal, hakiya mawada ku aisian atu inai' ku aisian nu imelangay a tademaw. (DIC) . nikadukaan nikalebawaan nu hecian alahican a mapatideng ku baluwangay a adadaan, nu sakalecaday nu le-muo-cen mapenec katukuh i liklik a hikan atu singkicu a nikapulungan, miketun tu nipacumudan tu idang sisa maduka atu nai' ku'ken. nikaadadaan nu baluwan a adadaan pasuukaukakan mawada' a tapalan atu adada'. mabuliyas ku idang masaluimeng ku culil nu idang u dumaan a hinaadih kita tu mahiniay a nikapulungan nu imelang, palusaimeng tu nipacumudan tu idnag tunikapihaceng nu adadaan ahicanen caay tu kapud ku nikatahekalan nu idangan.
S.PHON: == mabar~…ĺataj a baŇč…ôs mar~…ĺawp…ôsaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ****** == mabar~…ĺataj a baŇč…ôs mar~…ĺawp…ôsaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč: ir~…ĺabuaj nu mabar~…ĺataj nu ńß…ô ¶ian mar~…ĺańßur~…ĺ a adada. nu sipaw mar~…ĺańßur~…ĺ a nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu ¶i-ńßun-su Ē~ °, mi ¶umud i idaidaŇčan mir~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us tu buwa Ē~ °, sisa mar~…ĺibuwa Ē~ ° ku tad…ômaw ńßumiŇč sa tu. u adada nina mabar~…ĺataj a baŇč…ôs mar~…ĺawp…ôsaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, pasu adada nu ńß…ô ¶ińß…ô ¶ian, muta Ē~ ° atu mar~…ĺawmaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, anu pińßa ¶…ôŇč satu nu namakajdaaj i nikaaddaan nu baŇč…ôs atu mar~…ĺibuwaaj nu adada ńßakija. ina im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a tad…ômaw ńßakija idaw ku kar~…ĺar~…ĺum…ônian nu sumanańß nu kur~…ĺitan a mańßida u ti Ē~ °kuk kasar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ nu isian atu ¶aaj kai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku bar~…ĺu ¶u. *,*** u/r~…ĺ,********,*** u/r~…ĺ. nikaduka ninańß…ô ¶i satabakiaj nu namakajda namini i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj, mańßida u nipa ¶i ¶ian a kawaw, mar~…ĺakuujt ku nipinanam, sapaju atu pakar~…ĺar~…ĺuwajr~…ĺuwaj sa mukan, dumatu a nikaadadaan pasumar~…ĺar~…ĺid, maar~…ĺa nu diŇčki, mabaju Ē~ °, samuńßmuńß sa ¶aaj pijundu, ¶aaj ka tan…ôŇč ku idaŇč atu nikar~…ĺatan nu bau. idaw ku siaur~…ĺan a tad…ômaw, sisa ńßinaadada ku ńß…ô ¶ińß…ô ¶ian sa im…ôr~…ĺaŇč satu. mabar~…ĺataj a baŇč…ôs mar~…ĺawp…ôsaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßina sipakajda i isi Ē~ ° a mikinsa atu i s…ôn-wi- ¶in mikinsa, anu nu isi Ē~ °an anikinsaan tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk u j…ôn-sin nika itini i s…ôn-wi- ¶in nai Ē~ ° ku sumanańßaj a idawŇč nu mar~…ĺian, ńßakija aw u mabar~…ĺataj a baŇč…ôs mar~…ĺawp…ôsaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. sipakajda i idaŇč maadińß ku ¶i-su…ôn- ¶i-m…ôi tadapińßa ¶…ôŇč ku r~…ĺup…ôna ¶ mikikaka tu **** u/r~…ĺ , anu pańßa ¶…ôŇč ńßakija mikikaka tu **** u/r~…ĺ. ina im…ôr~…ĺaŇč atu nika im…ôr~…ĺaŇč***** mabar~…ĺataj a baŇč…ôs mar~…ĺawp…ôsaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč a nina im…ôr~…ĺaŇč namakajda i pińßa ¶…ôŇč atu nai Ē~ ° nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu buwa Ē~ °an a nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan. anu ¶aaj ka pińßa ¶…ôŇč nai Ē~ ° ku ńßi ¶ańßi ¶a nu adada nu ńß…ô ¶ian, sisa u nuduma kija a w…ôndajan kan ¶a a kinsaan ku idaŇč kija katin…ôŇčan. u tat…ôŇčaaj a mabar~…ĺataj a baŇč…ôs mar~…ĺawp…ôsaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč kan ¶a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku nikaadada nu ńß…ô ¶ian, p…ôn…ô ¶…ôn adada Ē~ °, nai Ē~ ° ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč atu bar~…ĺ…ôbawa. . anu am…ôr~…ĺik ku nikar~…ĺ…ôbawa, u idaŇč am…ôr~…ĺik tajda i kikan mi ¶umud i madukaaj a ńß…ô ¶ian sa, ar~…ĺaw a mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp ku idaŇč atu mabur~…ĺir~…ĺańß, mańßiniaj a kawaw ar~…ĺaw a namakajda i im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a tad…ômaw, sipakajda i mar~…ĺujuńßaj a r~…ĺumaan a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ. nu dumaan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan nai Ē~ ° ku ńßi ¶ańßi ¶a a wajwajan, ar~…ĺaw ńßan u nikak…ôr~…ĺa ¶an nu ńß…ô ¶i nika dukaan nu ńß…ô ¶ian a nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan. . nikadukaan nu ńß…ô ¶i anpatańß…ôkar~…ĺan mi ¶umud i idaidaŇčan, mar~…ĺa ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku tin- ¶…ôa- ¶…ô, sisa maŇčar~…ĺaj mur~…ĺi Ē~ °,muta Ē~ °, ¶aaj ka tin…ôŇč tu tad…ômaw, mabur~…ĺir~…ĺańß atu mar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, ina im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a tad…ômaw u isi Ē~ ° nida ńßakija idaw ku ¶i-ńßun-su tunika r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °, itini i nakamuan nu misajdan u "u ¶ijaan a kur~…ĺitan nu isi Ē~ °an". nika kukaan nu buwaan ńßina tida i ńß…ô ¶i tu mańßkamaduka nu nikuda tu sabaw tusa katuku tu tusa a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku s…ôpat a tatukian a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, ńßakija mawada ku aisian atu inai Ē~ ° ku aisian nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a tad…ômaw. (di ¶) . nikadukaan nikar~…ĺ…ôbawaan nu ńß…ô ¶ian ar~…ĺańßi ¶an a mapatid…ôŇč ku bar~…ĺuwaŇčaj a adadaan, nu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj nu r~…ĺ…ô-muo- ¶…ôn map…ôn…ô ¶ katukuńß i r~…ĺikr~…ĺik a ńßikan atu siŇčki ¶u a nikapur~…ĺuŇčan, mik…ôtun tu nipa ¶umudan tu idaŇč sisa maduka atu nai Ē~ ° ku Ē~ °k…ôn. nikaadadaan nu bar~…ĺuwan a adadaan pasuukaukakan mawada Ē~ ° a tapar~…ĺan atu adada Ē~ °. mabur~…ĺijas ku idaŇč masar~…ĺuim…ôŇč ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu idaŇč u dumaan a ńßinaadińß kita tu mańßiniaj a nikapur~…ĺuŇčan nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, par~…ĺusaim…ôŇč tu nipa ¶umudan tu idnag tunikapińßa ¶…ôŇč nu adadaan ańßi ¶an…ôn ¶aaj tu kapud ku nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu idaŇčan.
S.FORM: == mabalatay a banges malawpesay a imelang ś©ęÁīčŤāĆśļ∂Ťß£Áóá == mabalatay a banges malawpesay a imelang: ilabuay nu mabalatay nu hecian malahul a adada. nu sipaw malahul a nipatahekalan tu ci-hun-su', micumud i idaidangan mila'cus tu buwa', sisa malibuwa' ku tademaw huming sa tu. u adada nina mabalatay a banges malawpesay a imelang, pasu adada nu hecihecian, muta' atu malawmaw ku balucu', anu pihaceng satu nu namakaydaay i nikaaddaan nu banges atu malibuwaay nu adada hakiya. ina imelangay a tademaw hakiya idaw ku kalalumenian nu sumanah nu kulitan a mahida u ti'kuk kasalengac nu isian atu caay kaicelang ku balucu. 1,000 U/L,ŚöīťáćśôāŚŹĮŤÉĹťęėśĖľ5,000 U/L. nikaduka ninaheci satabakiay nu namakayda namini i hekalay, mahida u nipacician a kawaw, malakuuyt ku nipinanam, sapayu atu pakalaluwayluway sa mukan, dumatu a nikaadadaan pasumalalid, maala nu dingki, mabayu', samuhmuh sa caay piyundu, caay ka taneng ku idang atu nikalatan nu bau. idaw ku siaulan a tademaw, sisa hinaadada ku hecihecian sa imelang satu. mabalatay a banges malawpesay a imelang hina sipakayda i isi' a mikinsa atu i sen-wi-cin mikinsa, anu nu isi'an anikinsaan tu tatipeluk u yen-sin nika itini i sen-wi-cin nai' ku sumanahay a idawng nu malian, hakiya aw u mabalatay a banges malawpesay a imelang. sipakayda i idang maadih ku ci-suen-ci-mei tadapihaceng ku lupenac mikikaka tu 1000 U/L , anu pahaceng hakiya mikikaka tu 5000 U/L. ina imelang atu nika imelangÁóáÁčÄŤąáŚĺĶŚÄô mabalatay a banges malawpesay a imelang a nina imelang namakayda i pihaceng atu nai' nu icelang nu buwa'an a nikatahekalan. anu caay ka pihaceng nai' ku hicahica nu adada nu hecian, sisa u nuduma kiya a wendayan kanca a kinsaan ku idang kiya katinengan. u tatengaay a mabalatay a banges malawpesay a imelang kanca tahekal ku nikaadada nu hecian, penecen adada', nai' ku icelang atu balebawa. . anu amelik ku nikalebawa, u idang amelik tayda i kikan micumud i madukaay a hecian sa, alaw a maselep ku idang atu mabulilah, mahiniay a kawaw alaw a namakayda i imelangay a tademaw, sipakayda i maluyuhay a lumaan a patahekal. nu dumaan a imelangan nai' ku hicahica a waywayan, alaw han u nikakelacan nu heci nika dukaan nu hecian a nikatahekalan. . nikadukaan nu heci anpatahekalan micumud i idaidangan, mala caay kalecad ku tin-cea-ce, sisa mangalay muli',muta', caay ka tineng tu tademaw, mabulilah atu malawlaw ku balucu', ina imelangay a tademaw u isi' nida hakiya idaw ku ci-hun-su tunika lumeni', itini i nakamuan nu misaydan u "uciyaan a kulitan nu isi'an". nika kukaan nu buwaan hina tida i heci tu mahkamaduka nu nikuda tu sabaw tusa katuku tu tusa a lasubu idaw ku sepat a tatukian a tahekal, hakiya mawada ku aisian atu inai' ku aisian nu imelangay a tademaw. (DIC) . nikadukaan nikalebawaan nu hecian alahican a mapatideng ku baluwangay a adadaan, nu sakalecaday nu le-muo-cen mapenec katukuh i liklik a hikan atu singkicu a nikapulungan, miketun tu nipacumudan tu idang sisa maduka atu nai' ku'ken. nikaadadaan nu baluwan a adadaan pasuukaukakan mawada' a tapalan atu adada'. mabuliyas ku idang masaluimeng ku culil nu idang u dumaan a hinaadih kita tu mahiniay a nikapulungan nu imelang, palusaimeng tu nipacumudan tu idnag tunikapihaceng nu adadaan ahicanen caay tu kapud ku nikatahekalan nu idangan.

mar~…ĺańßur~…ĺ a nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu ¶i-ńßun-su Ē~ °, mi ¶umud i idaidaŇčan mir~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us tu buwa Ē~ °, sisa mar~…ĺibuwa Ē~ ° ku tad…ômaw ńßumiŇč sa tu. u adada nina mabar~…ĺataj a baŇč…ôs ńßakija. ina im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a tad…ômaw ńßakija idaw ku kar~…ĺar~…ĺum…ônian nu sumanańß nu kur~…ĺitan a mańßida u ti Ē~ °kuk kasar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ nu isian atu ¶aaj kai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku bar~…ĺu ¶u. *,*** u/r~…ĺ,********,*** u/r~…ĺ. nikaduka ninańß…ô ¶i satabakiaj nu namakajda namini i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj, mańßida u nipa ¶i ¶ian a kawaw, mar~…ĺakuujt ku nipinanam, sapaju atu pakar~…ĺar~…ĺuwajr~…ĺuwaj sa mukan, dumatu a nikaadadaan pasumar~…ĺar~…ĺid, maar~…ĺa nu diŇčki, mabaju Ē~ °, samuńßmuńß sa ¶aaj pijundu, ¶aaj ka tan…ôŇč ku idaŇč atu nikar~…ĺatan nu bau. idaw ku siaur~…ĺan a tad…ômaw, sisa ńßinaadada ku ńß…ô ¶ińß…ô ¶ian sa im…ôr~…ĺaŇč satu. mabar~…ĺataj a baŇč…ôs mar~…ĺawp…ôsaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßina sipakajda i isi Ē~ ° a mikinsa atu i s…ôn-wi- ¶in mikinsa, anu nu isi Ē~ °an anikinsaan tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk u j…ôn-sin nika itini i s…ôn-wi- ¶in nai Ē~ ° ku sumanańßaj a idawŇč nu mar~…ĺian, ńßakija aw u mabar~…ĺataj a baŇč…ôs mar~…ĺawp…ôsaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. sipakajda i idaŇč maadińß ku ¶i-su…ôn- ¶i-m…ôi tadapińßa ¶…ôŇč ku r~…ĺup…ôna ¶ mikikaka tu **** u/r~…ĺ , anu pańßa ¶…ôŇč ńßakija mikikaka tu **** u/r~…ĺ. ina im…ôr~…ĺaŇč atu nika im…ôr~…ĺaŇč***** mabar~…ĺataj a baŇč…ôs mar~…ĺawp…ôsaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč a nina im…ôr~…ĺaŇč namakajda i pińßa ¶…ôŇč atu nai Ē~ ° nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu buwa Ē~ °an a nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan. anu ¶aaj ka pińßa ¶…ôŇč nai Ē~ ° ku ńßi ¶ańßi ¶a nu adada nu ńß…ô ¶ian, sisa u nuduma kija a w…ôndajan kan ¶a a kinsaan ku idaŇč kija katin…ôŇčan. u tat…ôŇčaaj a mabar~…ĺataj a baŇč…ôs mar~…ĺawp…ôsaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč kan ¶a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku nikaadada nu ńß…ô ¶ian, p…ôn…ô ¶…ôn adada Ē~ °, nai Ē~ ° ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč atu bar~…ĺ…ôbawa. . anu am…ôr~…ĺik ku nikar~…ĺ…ôbawa, u idaŇč am…ôr~…ĺik tajda i kikan mi ¶umud i madukaaj a ńß…ô ¶ian sa, ar~…ĺaw a mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp ku idaŇč atu mabur~…ĺir~…ĺańß, mańßiniaj a kawaw ar~…ĺaw a namakajda i im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a tad…ômaw, sipakajda i mar~…ĺujuńßaj a r~…ĺumaan a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ. nu dumaan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan nai Ē~ ° ku ńßi ¶ańßi ¶a a wajwajan, ar~…ĺaw ńßan u nikak…ôr~…ĺa ¶an nu ńß…ô ¶i nika dukaan nu ńß…ô ¶ian a nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan. . nikadukaan nu ńß…ô ¶i anpatańß…ôkar~…ĺan mi ¶umud i idaidaŇčan, mar~…ĺa ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku tin- ¶…ôa- ¶…ô, sisa maŇčar~…ĺaj mur~…ĺi Ē~ °,muta Ē~ °, ¶aaj ka tin…ôŇč tu tad…ômaw, mabur~…ĺir~…ĺańß atu mar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, ina im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a tad…ômaw u isi Ē~ ° nida ńßakija idaw ku ¶i-ńßun-su tunika r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °, itini i nakamuan nu misajdan u "u ¶ijaan a kur~…ĺitan nu isi Ē~ °an". nika kukaan nu buwaan ńßina tida i ńß…ô ¶i tu mańßkamaduka nu nikuda tu sabaw tusa katuku tu tusa a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku s…ôpat a tatukian a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, ńßakija mawada ku aisian atu inai Ē~ ° ku aisian nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a tad…ômaw. (di ¶) . nikadukaan nikar~…ĺ…ôbawaan nu ńß…ô ¶ian ar~…ĺańßi ¶an a mapatid…ôŇč ku bar~…ĺuwaŇčaj a adadaan, nu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj nu r~…ĺ…ô-muo- ¶…ôn map…ôn…ô ¶ katukuńß i r~…ĺikr~…ĺik a ńßikan atu siŇčki ¶u a nikapur~…ĺuŇčan, mik…ôtun tu nipa ¶umudan tu idaŇč sisa maduka atu nai Ē~ ° ku Ē~ °k…ôn. nikaadadaan nu bar~…ĺuwan a adadaan pasuukaukakan mawada Ē~ ° a tapar~…ĺan atu adada Ē~ °. mabur~…ĺijas ku idaŇč masar~…ĺuim…ôŇč ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu idaŇč u dumaan a ńßinaadińß kita tu mańßiniaj a nikapur~…ĺuŇčan nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, par~…ĺusaim…ôŇč tu nipa ¶umudan tu idnag tunikapińßa ¶…ôŇč nu adadaan ańßi ¶an…ôn ¶aaj tu kapud ku nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu idaŇčan.
